title: Saudi Arabian Vegetable Pilaf
description: A flavorful and aromatic Middle Eastern-inspired rice dish, packed with nutritious vegetables. Perfect for a light lunch or dinner.
instructions: Heat oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add onion and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add carrots, zucchini, and tomato. Cook for an additional 3 minutes.
Stir in the Spiced Robustly Blend, salt, and black pepper. Cook for 1 minute.
Add the pilaf rice to the saucepan, stirring to coat with the vegetable mixture.
Add 2 cups of water to the saucepan and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 18-20 minutes or until the rice is cooked and the liquid has been absorbed.
Fluff the pilaf with a fork and serve hot.
